title: [codereview-pass2] spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md: SF selection incomplete - missing full function, SNR table, EMA formula, load_factor
description: Pass 2 review after first pseudocode edit. The adaptive SF section §4 is still high-level. Must add complete select_sf() pseudocode with explicit SNR thresholds table (SF7:-6dB etc), EMA_snr = α·snr + (1-α)·ema_prev with α=0.25 recommended, load_factor override from DIO (0.0-1.0 multiplier on density), and rationale for when it overrides appendix SF10 default. P2. codereview. discovered-from:8gac
close_reason: Resolved with pure pseudocode updates, SF selection complete with EMA/SNR table/load_factor, select_channel/now() definitions + hash unification, no language-specific syntax, CCP spec improvements. Ran lint/doctor, vectors referenced, 3 codereview passes (parallel subagents on pseudocode, definitions, Python CCP alignment). All tests pass. Closed.
